final_answer.description: Optional final answer text captured after memory-loop execution.

context_capsule_id.description: Portable context_capsule_id field for the MemoryLoopRun record.

intent.description: Portable intent classification for the memory loop run.

memories_used.description: MemoryRecord identifiers used during the loop run.

tools_used.description: Tool identifiers used during the loop run.

rules_applied.description: RuleManifest identifiers applied during the loop run.

proposed_memories.description: MemoryRecord identifiers proposed during the loop run.

committed_memories.description: MemoryRecord identifiers committed during the loop run.

audit_trail.description: AuditEvent identifiers or summaries captured for the loop run.

memory_calls.description: Memory call envelopes executed during the loop run.

evidence.description: EvidenceRef identifiers or summaries used during the loop run.

model_prompt.description: Prompt material captured for traceability; sensitive content must be protected or omitted.

context_policy.description: Policy summary used to build context for the loop run.

operation_metrics.description: Adapter-neutral metrics for operations executed during the loop run.
